---

# 🛠️ Crafting a Player Shop

To create a player shop, you'll need to **craft the custom Shopcase**.

---

## 📦 Crafting Recipe

You’ll need:

![aaaa](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/117019767/575405568-9775e0dd-9f25-4865-be0e-a3abc092e481.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzU2NjcwMzQsIm5iZiI6MTc3NTY2NjczNCwicGF0aCI6Ii8xMTcwMTk3NjcvNTc1NDA1NTY4LTk3NzVlMGRkLTlmMjUtNDg2NS1iZTBlLWEzYWJjMDkyZTQ4MS5wbmc_.ELWcJtiyrUGPSi_5rqGA8I5oKHFDCZ5w9dN6raqHJ2o)

- 💎 **1 Emerald**
- 🧱 **1 Chest**


> 📝 The resulting block will become your **Shopcase**.

---

### 🧪 Command Method (Optional)

You can get your shopcase with this command.

```mcfunction
/function ketket_player_shop:give_shop
